task_completion.description: Create the first page named 'System Context' in draw.io
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the draw.io interface, the page tab at the bottom should be renamed to 'System Context'.

task_completion.description: Add the four required Context entities to the System Context diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas should show C4 shapes labeled with: 'Personal Banking Customer', 'Internet Banking System', 'Mainframe Banking System', and 'E-mail System'.

task_completion.description: Create a second page named 'Container' in the same draw.io file
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the draw.io interface, a second page tab at the bottom should be visible and named 'Container'.

task_completion.description: Add the four required Container entities to the Container diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: The canvas on the Container page should show C4 shapes labeled with: 'Single-Page Application', 'Web Application', 'API Application', and 'Database'.

task_completion.description: Connect the entities with arrows labeled with the required relationship terms
task_completion.visual_evidence: Arrows connecting the shapes should have text labels including 'views account', 'makes payments', 'sends e-mail', 'reads from', and 'writes to'.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as 'banking_system_c4.drawio' in the ~/Diagrams/ directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer window showing the file 'banking_system_c4.drawio' being saved or existing in the 'Diagrams' folder.

task_completion.description: Export the complete multi-page diagram as a PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io PDF export dialog being used, or a file explorer showing 'banking_system_c4.pdf' in the 'Diagrams' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagrams
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application window open with the canvas, toolbars, and shape panels visible, rather than just terminal commands generating an XML file.

integrity.description: The agent used actual C4 notation shapes rather than generic rectangles
integrity.visual_evidence: The shapes on the canvas should have the distinct C4 model styling (e.g., Person, Software System, Container shapes with standard C4 headers/metadata), typically found in the draw.io C4 shape library.

integrity.description: The agent exported the PDF using draw.io's built-in export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'File -> Export as -> PDF...' menu or dialog in draw.io, ensuring the PDF wasn't just a renamed text file or created via a CLI bypass.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a C4 model with two specific pages: 'System Context' and 'Container'. The System Context diagram must include four entities: 'Personal Banking Customer', 'Internet Banking System', 'Mainframe Banking System', and 'E-mail System'. The Container diagram must include four entities: 'Single-Page Application', 'Web Application', 'API Application', and 'Database'. The relationships between these entities must be labeled with specific terms: 'views account', 'makes payments', 'sends e-mail', 'reads from', and 'writes to'. The final outputs must be 'banking_system_c4.drawio' and 'banking_system_c4.pdf' located in the '~/Diagrams/' directory.
